textPlain: If you check my comments Im a routine critic of Apple. Specifically its mis-management of Siri.But, in my mind, Tim Cook is also responsible for the only exceptional qualities of Apple. Namely its production of the M series chips and the Vision Pro (yes really).They better have someone outstanding in mind as a replacement.Otherwise I could easily see the successor mildly improve Siri/AI functions, while continuing Apples new disastrous design language and drop the ball on the supply chain and vertical integration that makes their hardware products second to none.
